mapper.insert: INSERT INTO oa_ai_source_chunk (source_id, chunk_no, section_title, page_no, content_text, content_hash, token_count, vector_key, metadata_json, status) VALUES (#{sourceId}, #{chunkNo}, #{sectionTitle}, #{pageNo}, #{contentText}, #{contentHash}, #{tokenCount}, #{vectorKey}, #{metadataJson}, #{status})

INSERT INTO oa_ai_source_chunk (source_id, chunk_no, section_title, page_no, content_text, content_hash, token_count, vector_key, metadata_json, status) VALUES
(#{c.sourceId}, #{c.chunkNo}, #{c.sectionTitle}, #{c.pageNo}, #{c.contentText}, #{c.contentHash}, #{c.tokenCount}, #{c.vectorKey}, #{c.metadataJson}, #{c.status})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM oa_ai_source_chunk WHERE source_id = #{sourceId} ORDER BY chunk_no ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE oa_ai_source_chunk SET status = #{status} WHERE source_id = #{sourceId}
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM oa_ai_source_chunk WHERE vector_key IN
#{key}
